subject: feat(platforms): add nested platform specs, two-level selector, and export format choice
body:
Restructure platforms.js from flat array to nested platformGroups with
per-format metadata (tips, recommendedFormat, maxFileSize). Redesign
PlatformPreview as a two-level Category → Platform → Format selector
with info bar and collapsible tips. Add PNG/JPG/WebP export format
toggle to ExportButtons with per-platform format recommendations.

Instagram expanded from 2 to 4 formats (Feed Portrait, Square, Feed
Landscape, Story/Reels). Facebook expanded from 1 to 4 formats (Feed,
Square, Story, Cover Photo). All platforms now have tips and file specs.

Tags: platforms, export, ui, data
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
